creator: wenheping2000@hotmail.com
text:
Hi,

   poudriere reported 2 errors:

  ====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Warning: you may not need USES=desktop-file-utils
Error: /usr/local/bin/saga_cmd is linked to /usr/local/llvm60/lib/libomp.so from devel/llvm60 but it is not declared as a dependency
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: bin/saga_cmd
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/math/saga
=>> Error: check-plist failures detected
build of math/saga | saga-7.0.0 ended at Thu Nov 29 14:06:34 CST 2018
build time: 00:25:22
!!! build failure encountered !!!
[02:30:59] Error: Build failed in phase: check-plist
[02:30:59] Cleaning up
12amd64-wen: removed
12amd64-wen-n: removed
[02:31:00] Unmounting file systems

wen
